headline: Boston Scientific (BSX) Invests $1.5B in MiRus for Equity Stake and TAVR Acquisition Option
summary: Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE:BSX) is one of the oversold tech stocks to buy now. On May 18, Boston Scientific invested $1.5 billion for a 34% equity stake in MiRus LLC, a company specializing in advanced biomaterials and medical implants. The deal includes an exclusive option for Boston Scientific to acquire MiRus’s proprietary TAVR system, which […]
